leadText: The Yellow Nectar (Japanese: やまぶきのミツ Golden Yellow Nectar) is an item introduced in Generation VII. It is one of the nectars associated with Oricorio.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on an Oricorio , it changes it to Pom-Pom Style . It can only be used outside of battle. It is consumed after use.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A flower nectar obtained at Melemele Meadow. It changes the form of certain species of Pokémon. S V Flower nectar obtained from a yellow flower. It changes the form of a certain species of Pokémon.
